problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Quantum. Quantum tunneling through energy barrier directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
